headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Mettler-Toledo Intl, Lowers Price Target to $1400
summary: Stifel  analyst Daniel Arias   maintains Mettler-Toledo Intl (NYSE:MTD) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $1600 to $1400.
